YOUNG DBA PARTNERS-3 ENTERTAINMENT DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-24-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-28-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-04-1995

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-09-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-09-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 3RD OSC; IF PLAINTIFF DOES NOT COMPLY WITH COURT RULES COURT WILL DISMISS CASE FOR LACK OF PROSECUTION. HEARING SET FOR SEP-12-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
RESPONSIVE DECLARATION TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AGAINST COUNSEL FILED BY PLAINTIFF
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
